messages.text: В ЭТОМ РЕЙДЕ У МЕНЯ БЫЛО НЕСКОЛЬКО НЕУДАЧНЫХ МОМЕНТОВ, НО В СЛЕДУЮЩИЙ РАЗ ТЕБЕ БУДЕТ НЕ ТАК ЛЕГКО
spt givemealltheclother
I'm sorry soldier, I don't recognize the command you are trying to use! Type "help" to see available commands.
help
The available commands will be listed below:
Commands available for "spt" prefix:

Subcommand trader:
spt trader 
 ======== 
 Sets the reputation or money spent to the input quantity through the message system.

	spt trader [trader] rep [quantity]
		Ex: spt trader prapor rep 2

	spt trader [trader] spend [quantity]
		Ex: spt trader therapist spend 1000000

Subcommand profile:
spt profile
========
Sets the profile level or skill to the desired level through the message system.

	spt profile level [desired level]
		Ex: spt profile level 20

	spt profile skill [skill name] [quantity]
		Ex: spt profile skill metabolism 51

Subcommand give:
spt give
========
Sends items to the player through the message system.

	spt give [template ID] [quantity]
		Ex: spt give 544fb25a4bdc2dfb738b4567 2

	spt give ["item name"] [quantity]
		Ex: spt give "pack of sugar" 10

	spt give [locale] ["item name"] [quantity]
		Ex: spt give fr "figurine de chat" 3

Subcommand givemealltheclothes:
Usage: Unlocks all Black Division, RUAF, and Civilian customizations

Subcommand backstabber:
Usage: Unlocks access to all post 1.0 Arena/Battlepass clothing

Subcommand ibeatthegameiswear:
Usage: Receive all four endings customizations (dogtags, hideout, main menu environments, armbands, etc)

Subcommand nikitasvoice:
Usage: Receive Nikita's Voice

Subcommand shutupandtakemyroubles:
Usage: Receive all preorder/beta content

Subcommand 67prestige:
Usage: Receive Prestige 5 and 6 content

Subcommand twitchguytwitchguytwitchguy:
Usage: Receive all post 1.0 Twitch drop content
